title: Shaft
notes: Paradigmatic Blaxploitation; first major Black-directed studio action film

title: Coffy
notes: Pam Grier lead debut; defines female Blaxploitation archetype

title: Foxy Brown
notes: Pam Grier follow-up; genre peak; Hill's most cited Blaxploitation work

title: Black Girl
notes: Ossie Davis; social-realist strand within the movement

title: Cooley High
notes: Youth-Blaxploitation; proto-hood film; frequently cited in movement surveys

title: Hell Up in Harlem
notes: Sequel to Black Caesar; genre-interior sequel loop typical of movement

title: Juice
notes: Post-Blaxploitation urban crossover; Dickerson bridges movement to 1990s hood film

title: Demon Knight
notes: Horror crossover; loose movement affiliation via Dickerson
